statement: They're very accommodating, helped me with my business registration, and even connected me with people who could help my business grow.

Highly recommended for startup companies !! Very supportive Management. more power Espasyo
Great space for meetings and project makings for academic tasks. Office space on the 2nd floor is good also and the availability of materials that can be used (printer, projector, etc).
Thank you for helping me awhile ago. It was far from my place but I enjoyed the environment.
Internet is very fast! So if you need internet for work/study, this is the place to be. Also liked the fact that I can bring food without any corkage fees. Super recommended!
Perfect place for those who need to study or work. They are very accommodating sa guests at ung coffee nila, the best 💗
very relaxing inside and has a friendly staffs
I highly recommend this place. They are very kind and accommodating.

this is place is relaxing, peaceful and quiet, perfect place for a student who needs this kind of environment to focus on his/her school works. it also offers snacks and the teachers there are very knowledgeable and can lend you a hand on some works or problems
I love how Espasyo Study & Office Hub is very harmonious and peaceful. Its review center is affordable and the teachers are clear and easy to get, giving us a memorable experience.

One of the best  review center with friendly, accommodating and knowledgeable educator. They provide excellent methods to learn the lesson quickly and accurately. There place is very conducive for studying,learning and working. A quiet ambiance with unlimited coffee highly recommended.

During my CET review, the classes helped me remember the past lessons I had during the past years. The review classes helped me develop techniques that can be used during the exams. Furthermore, the classes really helped me remember the lessons that i have already forgotten. In addition, the classes helped me understand some lessons that I am having a hard time with. The review classes were helpful, and the staffs are extremely welcoming which made the environment more conducive to learning and developing skills. The teachers who teach us have an extensive range of knowledge with the subjects they teach. All in all, the review sessions that I took in Espasyo were really beneficial to me as it helped me remember lessons that I have already forgotten, develop techniques necessary for the exam, and understand lessons that I had difficulty understanding in school.

Although I've been studying for College Entrance Tests by myself for a long time, I feel like I would have missed out if I didn't join Espasyo's CET review class. 
I didn't expect the simulated test environment to help me with my test-taking skills. It was a simple set-up. There was no extra clutter aside from a table and the occasional mini-bonsai. The place was clean and void of dust. Not forgetting to mention how nice and cold it was inside the venue. Inside the venue and class itself, all the students are like me: focused on the goal of passing CETs. They also paid attention to the teacher and remained quiet, which helped me understand the lesson better unlike in other classes and places where everyone would speak at the same time. This place also helped me handle test taking time pressure without my family or friends interrupting me.
The subjects of the CET review are also another reason why I enjoyed Espasyo. The lessons were fixed and organized. They knew what topics and lessons we had to prioritize for CETs. They also gave us tips on how to eliminate wrong answers, and they showed us what lessons and topics usually appear on CETs. Every subject we did had a thorough study plan or style that helped us grasp the concept faster. Our teachers gave us a brief review to start, then they would discuss the hows and whys. Then they would test us each time to make sure we understood each topic and lesson. They helped us understand what we needed to study.
In conclusion, if I didn't join the Espasyo CET review program- I would have been less confident in my chances of passing CETs. The review really helped me and I thank Espasyo for giving me the opportunity to learn.
I LOVE ESPASYO! 😍😘😀
super cozy! even my clients love the place ❤ more makeup workshop for us espasyo! Fingers crossed. 😍
Espasyo Study & Office Hub has this ambiance that motivates you to be productive. Thank you, Espasyo for providing the space that we needed as students! More power and Happy Anniversary!

I highly recommend espasyo specially for students who wants to focus on their academics. They will make you feel like you are at home and comfortable as much as possible. They also offer extra services such as tutor for CET’s And even Consultations for Thesis. Rate of 10/10🤗

Fast internet connection which is good for downloading huge files. This is a place for studying. Convenient and affordable place to set up meetings and events. Fully air-conditioned. Customer service is excellent! 😊

I love the ambiance and the cozy feel of the place. A great place to study or for your lone time. Moreover, the rate is indeed reasonable for students. Also, the owner and other staffs are very accomodating. ((thumbs up for the fast wifi connection))
Highly recommended for students who will take their CETs, great place, great service, at an affordable rate 👍
Perfect Place to study and review

I would normally not write a review about a study cafe, however, I'm making the exception for two reasons: 
(1) Espasyo is by far, beyond a shadow of doubt, the best place to study, read, and do research papers/thesis. The place is very cozy and their coffee is superb.
(2)  Ms. Neri is very friendly and she would always check if you have everything you need. Like me, she's also a teacher so she really understands my need to have a thinking space for my doctoral thesis writing. 
I'll definitely be back!
Espasyo is a perfect place for reviewing or just having a time for yourself.  It is also conducive for meeting, seminars and other events. A must-visit!!!!

A place to stay. Clean, neat, relaxing, fast internet. With great level of security. A place for students, professionals, free lancer, businessman for meetings, tutorials (since they have inhouse teachers that could help you in subjects like math or thesis),chillax or even jamming . You can bring your food or drinks (not smelly), no corkage! But they have snacks should you wish to order. I' m pretty excited to try the clubhouse and nachos!  😄 The staffs are so accommodatingg and they adjust based on customer's need. So privilege to hear the story behind this store. Business with a heart. God Bless you more!
5 stars
It’s a very nice place to study! I love the ambiance of it.
